diagnosis: The level is an extremely long horizontal corridor (~300 tiles wide) with almost no vertical variation — the player spends ~90 seconds idle at spawn, then traverses rightward at nearly constant elevation (y≈880–950) with only minor platform hops. Two falls occur late (x≈5000 and x≈9165) where the flat floor briefly drops, but otherwise the trace shows zero elevation change, no climbing, no ladders, and no meaningful path choices. The player completed it in 220s with 2 deaths and 8 hits taken, but rated it only 3/5 and explicitly noted 'the path seemed too clear, just one option to move to the end'.
